meta.title: Contact Eye On Idea | B2B Web Agency, Denmark
meta.description: Contact Eye On Idea to discuss your website or brand project. You don't need a finished brief — just tell us where you are and we'll figure out the rest.

hero.title: You don't need a perfect brief
hero.subtitle: Tell us where your business is right now and what feels unclear or unresolved. We'll work out the right next step together — no pressure, no commitment.

form.heading: Tell us about your situation

message.label: Message
message.placeholder: Describe your situation, what you're trying to solve, or what feels unclear. There's no wrong answer here.

form.successMessage: Message received — thank you. We'll review it and get back to you within one business day with a clear next step.
form.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again, or reach us directly at
form.gdprNotice: By contacting Eye On Idea, you consent to be contacted via the information provided regarding your inquiry. Under the EU's GDPR regulation, your data will only be used for communication related to your inquiry and will never be shared with third parties.

directContact.title: Direct Contact
directContact.description: Prefer a direct conversation? Reach out via email or phone.

location.title: Location
location.description: Serving clients across Denmark, the Nordics, and the European Union.

cta.title: Want to understand the packages first?
cta.description: See how Foundation, Growth, and Brand Partner are structured — and which level fits where your business is right now.
